title: elaeocarpus bokorensis
intro: Elaeocarpus bokorensis, also known as Bokorensis Elaeocarpus, is a species of flowering plant in the Elaeocarpaceae family, native to Cambodia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus bokorensis include its potential to treat fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant and anti-inflammatory agent. Elaeocarpus bokorensis can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to alleviate various health conditions.
